---
title: "Towards Integrated Photonics: a review of femtosecond laser-written double-line waveguides in GeO2-PbO glasses"
date: 2026-06-01
author:
  - name: Fernandes, Thiago Vecchi
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus Ursus
  - name: De Rossi, Wagner
  - name: Kassab, Luciana Reyes Pires
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Optical Materials"
  volume: 174
  doi: "10.1016/j.optmat.2026.118013"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Towards Integrated Photonics: a review of femtosecond laser-written double-line waveguides in GeO2-PbO glasses</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
